description:
IPC utility functions are duplicated between agent-runner and orchestrator-cli:

- `write_json_line` — identical in agent-runner/ipc/router.rs:42 and orchestrator-cli/shared/runner.rs:337
- `collect_json_payload_lines` — identical in agent-runner/runner/event_persistence.rs:87 and shared/runner.rs:914
- `append_line` — identical in event_persistence.rs:104 and shared/runner.rs:931
- `stream_type_label` — identical in event_persistence.rs:79 and shared/runner.rs:906 (also re-implemented as output_stream_type_label in ops_mcp.rs:3004)
- `event_matches_run` — in shared/runner.rs:818, matches on all AgentRunEvent variants to extract run_id. Should be a method on AgentRunEvent in protocol.
- `truncate_for_log` — duplicated within agent-runner itself (process.rs:17 and ipc/router.rs:20)

Solution: Move these to protocol crate (since AgentRunEvent and OutputStreamType are already there). Add `AgentRunEvent::run_id() -> &str` method. Delete all copies.
title: Extract shared IPC utilities into protocol crate (write_json_line, event helpers)
